title: 「Rather」句型
titleZh: 「Rather」句型表達修正或更準確的觀點
titleEn: Using Rather to correct or state a more accurate view

omissions: English translations for Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are editorial; English content already present in the PDF is retained.
The PDF supplies the descriptive lesson title in Chinese only; titleEn is an editorial translation.

formula: Subject + negative or limited statement. Rather, + subject + verb + corrected idea.

formulas.formula: Subject + negative or limited statement. Rather, + subject + verb + corrected idea.

example: Life should not be about others. Rather, it is about how we choose to live our lives.
exampleZh: 人生不應該只關於別人；更準確地說，它應該關乎我們如何選擇過自己的生活。

examples.en: Life should not be about others. Rather, it is about how we choose to live our lives.
examples.zh: 人生不應該只關於別人；更準確地說，它應該關乎我們如何選擇過自己的生活。
examples.highlight: Rather, it is about how we choose to live our lives.

benefits.en: It helps you correct a viewpoint more clearly by rejecting an inaccurate idea and immediately providing a more accurate one.
benefits.zh: 更清楚地修正觀點：不只是說某個想法錯了，還能立即提出更準確的說法。

benefits.en: It makes a correction sound more natural and polite than directly rejecting another person’s idea.
benefits.zh: 令語氣較自然和有禮貌；相比直接否定別人，使用 Rather 可以令修正聽起來較平和。

benefits.en: It makes writing more logical by clearly showing the shift from “not A” to “but, more accurately, B”.
benefits.zh: 令文章更有邏輯，讓讀者清楚看見「不是 A，而是 B」的思想轉變。

benefits.en: It makes English expression more mature and is common in argumentative writing, reports, speeches, discussions and deeper everyday conversations.
benefits.zh: 令英語表達更成熟；Rather 常見於議論文、報告、演講、討論及較深入的日常對話。

rules.en: Rather, is followed by a complete sentence and usually introduces a correction, a redefinition or a more accurate account of the previous idea. It is normally followed by a comma.
rules.zh: Rather, + 完整句子。Rather 通常用來修正、重新界定或更準確地表達前一句的觀點，後面通常有逗號。
examples: Life should not be about pleasing others. Rather, it should be about living according to our own values.

rules.en: Instead, is also followed by a complete sentence, but it more strongly emphasises that one action, choice or situation replaces another.
rules.zh: Instead, + 完整句子。Instead 較強調某個行動、選擇或情況取代了另一個行動、選擇或情況。
examples: He did not call me. Instead, he sent me a message.

rules.en: Instead of is followed by a noun, pronoun or verb-ing rather than a complete sentence.
rules.zh: Instead of + 名詞／代名詞／動詞-ing。Instead of 後面通常不是一個完整句子。
examples: I chose to study biology instead of art.
He sent me a message instead of calling me.

sourceOmissions: English translations for Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are editorial; English content already present in the PDF is retained.
The PDF supplies the descriptive lesson title in Chinese only; titleEn is an editorial translation.

en: Rewrite each sentence or pair of sentences using Rather to introduce the corrected or more accurate idea.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 Rather 改寫以下句子，以帶出修正後或更準確的觀點。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: Life should be about living according to our own values, not about pleasing other people.
questions.promptZh: 人生應該按照自己的價值觀生活，而不是取悅別人。
questions.answer: Life should not be about pleasing other people. Rather, it should be about living according to our own values.
questions.answerZh: 人生不應該以取悅別人為中心；相反，我們應該按照自己的價值觀生活。
questions.highlight: Life should not be about pleasing other people. Rather, it should be about living according to our own values.

questions.prompt: A good education is more than passing examinations; it teaches us how to think.
questions.promptZh: 良好的教育不只是通過考試；它還教導我們如何思考。
questions.answer: A good education is not only about passing examinations. Rather, it is about learning how to think.
questions.answerZh: 良好的教育不應只着重通過考試；更重要的是學習如何思考。
questions.highlight: A good education is not only about passing examinations. Rather, it is about learning how to think.

questions.prompt: Exercise should be a way to care for your body, not a punishment.
questions.promptZh: 運動應該是照顧身體的方法，而不是一種懲罰。
questions.answer: Exercise should not feel like a punishment. Rather, it should be a way to care for your body.
questions.answerZh: 運動不應令人覺得是一種懲罰；相反，它應該是照顧身體的方法。
questions.highlight: Exercise should not feel like a punishment. Rather, it should be a way to care for your body.

questions.prompt: Friendship should be measured by how well people support each other, not by how often they meet.
questions.promptZh: 友誼應該以人們如何互相支持來衡量，而不是以見面的次數來衡量。
questions.answer: Friendship is not measured by how often people meet. Rather, it is measured by how well they support each other.
questions.answerZh: 友誼並不是以人們見面的次數來衡量；更重要的是他們如何互相支持。
questions.highlight: Friendship is not measured by how often people meet. Rather, it is measured by how well they support each other.

questions.prompt: Reading is more than a school task; it is a way to discover new ideas.
questions.promptZh: 閱讀不只是一項學校功課；它也是發現新思想的方法。
questions.answer: Reading is not simply a school task. Rather, it is a way to discover new ideas.
questions.answerZh: 閱讀不只是一項學校功課；它其實是發現新思想的方法。
questions.highlight: Reading is not simply a school task. Rather, it is a way to discover new ideas.

questions.prompt: Success is not always the same as earning a lot of money. It may mean doing work that feels meaningful.
questions.promptZh: 成功不一定等於賺取大量金錢。它也可以指從事有意義的工作。
questions.answer: Success does not always mean earning a lot of money. Rather, it may mean doing work that feels meaningful.
questions.answerZh: 成功不一定代表賺取大量金錢；它也可能代表從事有意義的工作。
questions.highlight: Success does not always mean earning a lot of money. Rather, it may mean doing work that feels meaningful.

questions.prompt: A mistake does not prove that you are incapable. It gives you a chance to learn.
questions.promptZh: 一次錯誤並不能證明你沒有能力。它給你一個學習的機會。
questions.answer: A mistake is not proof that you are incapable. Rather, it is a chance to learn.
questions.answerZh: 一次錯誤並不能證明你沒有能力；相反，它是一個學習的機會。
questions.highlight: A mistake is not proof that you are incapable. Rather, it is a chance to learn.

questions.prompt: The rain itself is not the real problem. Our lack of preparation is the real problem.
questions.promptZh: 下雨本身並不是真正的問題。準備不足才是真正的問題。
questions.answer: The problem is not the rain itself. Rather, it is our lack of preparation.
questions.answerZh: 問題並不在於下雨本身；真正的問題是我們準備不足。
questions.highlight: The problem is not the rain itself. Rather, it is our lack of preparation.

questions.prompt: Good communication depends more on careful listening than on speaking the most.
questions.promptZh: 良好的溝通更取決於仔細聆聽，而不是說得最多。
questions.answer: Good communication is not about speaking the most. Rather, it is about listening carefully.
questions.answerZh: 良好的溝通並不在於說得最多；它在於仔細聆聽。
questions.highlight: Good communication is not about speaking the most. Rather, it is about listening carefully.

questions.prompt: The main purpose of this trip is to spend time with the family, not to go shopping.
questions.promptZh: 這次旅程的主要目的是與家人共度時間，而不是購物。
questions.answer: This trip is not mainly for shopping. Rather, it is for spending time with the family.
questions.answerZh: 這次旅程的主要目的不是購物；而是與家人共度時間。
questions.highlight: This trip is not mainly for shopping. Rather, it is for spending time with the family.

questions.prompt: The teacher was worried about the class’s progress, not angry with the students.
questions.promptZh: 老師擔心全班的學習進度，並不是對學生感到生氣。
questions.answer: The teacher was not angry with the class. Rather, she was worried about their progress.
questions.answerZh: 老師並不是對全班感到生氣；她其實是擔心學生的學習進度。
questions.highlight: The teacher was not angry with the class. Rather, she was worried about their progress.

questions.prompt: Ben needed time to think before replying; he was not ignoring the message.
questions.promptZh: 本需要時間思考才回覆；他並不是故意不理會訊息。
questions.answer: Ben did not ignore the message. Rather, he needed time to think before replying.
questions.answerZh: 本並不是故意不理會訊息；他只是需要時間思考才回覆。
questions.highlight: Ben did not ignore the message. Rather, he needed time to think before replying.

questions.prompt: The new rule is intended to keep everyone safe, not to punish students.
questions.promptZh: 新規則是為了保障所有人的安全，而不是懲罰學生。
questions.answer: The new rule is not meant to punish students. Rather, it is meant to keep everyone safe.
questions.answerZh: 新規則並不是為了懲罰學生；它是為了保障所有人的安全。
questions.highlight: The new rule is not meant to punish students. Rather, it is meant to keep everyone safe.

questions.prompt: When choosing a career, we should consider whether the work suits us, not only its salary.
questions.promptZh: 選擇職業時，我們應該考慮工作是否適合自己，而不應只考慮薪酬。
questions.answer: We should not choose a career only for its salary. Rather, we should consider whether the work suits us.
questions.answerZh: 我們不應只因薪酬而選擇職業；相反，我們應該考慮工作是否適合自己。
questions.highlight: We should not choose a career only for its salary. Rather, we should consider whether the work suits us.

questions.prompt: The museum is more than a place for old objects. It helps people understand the past.
questions.promptZh: 博物館不只是一個擺放古老物品的地方。它幫助人們了解過去。
questions.answer: The museum is not just a place for old objects. Rather, it helps people understand the past.
questions.answerZh: 博物館不只是一個擺放古老物品的地方；它更能幫助人們了解過去。
questions.highlight: The museum is not just a place for old objects. Rather, it helps people understand the past.

questions.prompt: Chloe left the meeting because she felt unwell, not because she was bored.
questions.promptZh: 克洛伊離開會議是因為感到不適，而不是因為感到沉悶。
questions.answer: Chloe did not leave the meeting because she was bored. Rather, she left because she felt unwell.
questions.answerZh: 克洛伊離開會議並不是因為感到沉悶；而是因為她感到不適。
questions.highlight: Chloe did not leave the meeting because she was bored. Rather, she left because she felt unwell.

questions.prompt: Homework is intended to help students practise what they have learnt, not simply to keep them busy.
questions.promptZh: 家課是為了幫助學生練習所學的內容，而不只是讓他們有事情做。
questions.answer: Homework is not meant simply to keep students busy. Rather, it is meant to help them practise what they have learnt.
questions.answerZh: 家課不只是為了讓學生有事情做；它是為了幫助他們練習所學的內容。
questions.highlight: Homework is not meant simply to keep students busy. Rather, it is meant to help them practise what they have learnt.

questions.prompt: The shop competes through excellent service, not by offering the lowest prices.
questions.promptZh: 這間商店以優質服務競爭，而不是以最低價格競爭。
questions.answer: The shop does not compete by offering the lowest prices. Rather, it competes by providing excellent service.
questions.answerZh: 這間商店並不是以最低價格競爭；它是以優質服務競爭。
questions.highlight: The shop does not compete by offering the lowest prices. Rather, it competes by providing excellent service.

questions.prompt: The film is really about trust and responsibility, not simply romance.
questions.promptZh: 這部電影真正探討的是信任和責任，而不只是一段愛情故事。
questions.answer: The film is not a simple love story. Rather, it is a story about trust and responsibility.
questions.answerZh: 這部電影並不是一個簡單的愛情故事；它其實是一個關於信任和責任的故事。
questions.highlight: The film is not a simple love story. Rather, it is a story about trust and responsibility.

questions.prompt: A team’s main aim should be to improve together, not only to win.
questions.promptZh: 球隊的主要目標應該是共同進步，而不只是勝出比賽。
questions.answer: A team should not focus only on winning. Rather, it should focus on improving together.
questions.answerZh: 球隊不應只專注於勝出比賽；相反，隊員應該專注於共同進步。
questions.highlight: A team should not focus only on winning. Rather, it should focus on improving together.

questions.prompt: How much time we have matters less than how wisely we use it.
questions.promptZh: 我們擁有多少時間並不是最重要；更重要的是我們如何善用時間。
questions.answer: The issue is less about how much time we have. Rather, it is about how wisely we use it.
questions.answerZh: 問題不太在於我們擁有多少時間；而在於我們如何善用時間。
questions.highlight: The issue is less about how much time we have. Rather, it is about how wisely we use it.

questions.prompt: The new app gives teachers another tool to support students; it does not replace them.
questions.promptZh: 這個新應用程式為教師提供另一種支援學生的工具；它並不會取代教師。
questions.answer: The new app does not remove the need for teachers. Rather, it gives them another tool to support students.
questions.answerZh: 這個新應用程式並不會令教師變得不再必要；它只是為教師提供另一種支援學生的工具。
questions.highlight: The new app does not remove the need for teachers. Rather, it gives them another tool to support students.

questions.prompt: Asking for help shows that a person understands their limits; it is not a sign of weakness.
questions.promptZh: 尋求協助顯示一個人了解自己的能力限制；這並不是軟弱的表現。
questions.answer: Asking for help is not a sign of weakness. Rather, it shows that a person understands their limits.
questions.answerZh: 尋求協助並不是軟弱的表現；相反，它顯示一個人了解自己的能力限制。
questions.highlight: Asking for help is not a sign of weakness. Rather, it shows that a person understands their limits.

questions.prompt: The manager was silent because she wanted more information, not because she agreed.
questions.promptZh: 經理保持沉默，是因為她想得到更多資料，而不是因為她表示同意。
questions.answer: The manager’s silence did not mean that she agreed. Rather, it meant that she wanted more information.
questions.answerZh: 經理保持沉默並不代表她同意；而是代表她想得到更多資料。
questions.highlight: The manager’s silence did not mean that she agreed. Rather, it meant that she wanted more information.

questions.prompt: The park was redesigned to make the area easier for everyone to use, not simply to improve its appearance.
questions.promptZh: 公園重新設計是為了讓所有人更容易使用該處，而不只是改善外觀。
questions.answer: The park was not redesigned simply to look attractive. Rather, it was redesigned to make the area easier for everyone to use.
questions.answerZh: 公園重新設計不只是為了令外觀更吸引；而是為了讓所有人更容易使用該處。
questions.highlight: The park was not redesigned simply to look attractive. Rather, it was redesigned to make the area easier for everyone to use.

questions.prompt: This meeting is intended to find a practical solution, not to blame anyone.
questions.promptZh: 這次會議是為了找出實際的解決方法，而不是責怪任何人。
questions.answer: This meeting is not intended to blame anyone. Rather, it is intended to find a practical solution.
questions.answerZh: 這次會議並不是為了責怪任何人；而是為了找出實際的解決方法。
questions.highlight: This meeting is not intended to blame anyone. Rather, it is intended to find a practical solution.

questions.prompt: The medicine helps the body recover gradually; it does not cure the illness immediately.
questions.promptZh: 這種藥物幫助身體逐漸康復；它不會立即治癒疾病。
questions.answer: The medicine does not cure the illness immediately. Rather, it helps the body recover gradually.
questions.answerZh: 這種藥物不會立即治癒疾病；它會幫助身體逐漸康復。
questions.highlight: The medicine does not cure the illness immediately. Rather, it helps the body recover gradually.

questions.prompt: Public transport benefits the whole city by reducing traffic, not only people without cars.
questions.promptZh: 公共交通透過減少交通擠塞令整個城市受惠，而不只是令沒有私家車的人受惠。
questions.answer: Public transport is not only useful for people without cars. Rather, it benefits the whole city by reducing traffic.
questions.answerZh: 公共交通不只是對沒有私家車的人有用；它亦透過減少交通擠塞令整個城市受惠。
questions.highlight: Public transport is not only useful for people without cars. Rather, it benefits the whole city by reducing traffic.

questions.prompt: The article warns that technology must be used responsibly; it does not claim that technology is harmful.
questions.promptZh: 這篇文章提醒人們必須負責任地使用科技；它並不是聲稱科技有害。
questions.answer: The article is not arguing that technology is harmful. Rather, it is warning that technology must be used responsibly.
questions.answerZh: 這篇文章並不是主張科技有害；而是提醒人們必須負責任地使用科技。
questions.highlight: The article is not arguing that technology is harmful. Rather, it is warning that technology must be used responsibly.

questions.prompt: Careful thought, not fear, guided Maya’s decision.
questions.promptZh: 引導瑪雅作出決定的是慎重思考，而不是恐懼。
questions.answer: Maya’s decision was not based on fear. Rather, it was based on careful thought.
questions.answerZh: 瑪雅的決定並不是基於恐懼；而是基於慎重思考。
questions.highlight: Maya’s decision was not based on fear. Rather, it was based on careful thought.

questions.prompt: Feedback should be used to improve our work, not treated as a personal attack.
questions.promptZh: 意見應該用來改善我們的工作，而不應被視為針對個人的攻擊。
questions.answer: We should not treat feedback as a personal attack. Rather, we should use it to improve our work.
questions.answerZh: 我們不應把意見視為針對個人的攻擊；相反，我們應該利用意見改善工作。
questions.highlight: We should not treat feedback as a personal attack. Rather, we should use it to improve our work.

questions.prompt: The lights were turned off to save electricity, not because the building was empty.
questions.promptZh: 關燈是為了節省電力，而不是因為大樓裏沒有人。
questions.answer: The lights were not turned off because the building was empty. Rather, they were turned off to save electricity.
questions.answerZh: 關燈並不是因為大樓裏沒有人；而是為了節省電力。
questions.highlight: The lights were not turned off because the building was empty. Rather, they were turned off to save electricity.

questions.prompt: A healthy diet is about making balanced choices most of the time, not avoiding every treat.
questions.promptZh: 健康飲食是在大部分時間作出均衡的選擇，而不是完全避開所有小食。
questions.answer: A healthy diet does not require people to avoid every treat. Rather, it requires them to make balanced choices most of the time.
questions.answerZh: 健康飲食並不要求人們完全避開所有小食；而是要求他們在大部分時間作出均衡的選擇。
questions.highlight: A healthy diet does not require people to avoid every treat. Rather, it requires them to make balanced choices most of the time.

questions.prompt: The library’s quiet rule is intended to give everyone a peaceful place to read, not to make visitors uncomfortable.
questions.promptZh: 圖書館的安靜規則是為了讓所有人有平靜的閱讀環境，而不是令訪客感到不自在。
questions.answer: The library’s quiet rule is not intended to make visitors uncomfortable. Rather, it is intended to give everyone a peaceful place to read.
questions.answerZh: 圖書館的安靜規則並不是為了令訪客感到不自在；而是為了讓所有人有平靜的閱讀環境。
questions.highlight: The library’s quiet rule is not intended to make visitors uncomfortable. Rather, it is intended to give everyone a peaceful place to read.

questions.prompt: The company should first understand what went wrong; a quick apology should not be its automatic response to every complaint.
questions.promptZh: 公司應該先了解問題所在；面對每宗投訴時，不應自動作出草率的道歉。
questions.answer: The company should not respond to every complaint with a quick apology. Rather, it should first understand what went wrong.
questions.answerZh: 公司不應面對每宗投訴時都立即草率道歉；相反，它應該先了解問題所在。
questions.highlight: The company should not respond to every complaint with a quick apology. Rather, it should first understand what went wrong.

questions.prompt: A problem in the computer system caused the delay, not careless workers.
questions.promptZh: 延誤是由電腦系統的問題造成，而不是由粗心的員工造成。
questions.answer: The delay was not caused by careless workers. Rather, it was caused by a problem in the computer system.
questions.answerZh: 延誤並不是由粗心的員工造成；而是由電腦系統的問題造成。
questions.highlight: The delay was not caused by careless workers. Rather, it was caused by a problem in the computer system.

questions.prompt: Learning a language is a personal process that takes regular practice, not a race against other students.
questions.promptZh: 學習語言是一個需要定期練習的個人過程，而不是與其他學生競賽。
questions.answer: Learning a language is not a race against other students. Rather, it is a personal process that takes regular practice.
questions.answerZh: 學習語言並不是與其他學生競賽；而是一個需要定期練習的個人過程。
questions.highlight: Learning a language is not a race against other students. Rather, it is a personal process that takes regular practice.

questions.prompt: The coach changed the plan because the weather had become unsafe, not because he had lost confidence.
questions.promptZh: 教練改變計劃是因為天氣變得不安全，而不是因為他失去信心。
questions.answer: The coach did not change the plan because he had lost confidence. Rather, he changed it because the weather had become unsafe.
questions.answerZh: 教練改變計劃並不是因為失去信心；而是因為天氣變得不安全。
questions.highlight: The coach did not change the plan because he had lost confidence. Rather, he changed it because the weather had become unsafe.

questions.prompt: Community service is a way for people to contribute to society, not free labour.
questions.promptZh: 社區服務是人們為社會作出貢獻的方法，而不是免費勞動。
questions.answer: Community service should not be viewed as free labour. Rather, it should be viewed as a way for people to contribute to society.
questions.answerZh: 社區服務不應被視為免費勞動；而應被視為人們為社會作出貢獻的方法。
questions.highlight: Community service should not be viewed as free labour. Rather, it should be viewed as a way for people to contribute to society.

questions.prompt: Change will happen. The important question is how we will respond to it.
questions.promptZh: 改變將會發生。重要的問題是我們將如何回應改變。
questions.answer: The question is not whether change will happen. Rather, it is how we will respond when it does.
questions.answerZh: 問題並不是改變會否發生；而是當改變發生時，我們將如何回應。
questions.highlight: The question is not whether change will happen. Rather, it is how we will respond when it does.

questions.prompt: The school is introducing tablets to give students more ways to learn, not to replace books completely.
questions.promptZh: 學校引入平板電腦是為了給學生更多學習方式，而不是完全取代書本。
questions.answer: The school is not introducing tablets to replace books completely. Rather, it is introducing them to give students more ways to learn.
questions.answerZh: 學校引入平板電腦並不是為了完全取代書本；而是為了給學生更多學習方式。
questions.highlight: The school is not introducing tablets to replace books completely. Rather, it is introducing them to give students more ways to learn.

questions.prompt: The hospital’s new system is designed to help staff identify urgent cases more quickly, not merely to reduce waiting times.
questions.promptZh: 醫院的新系統旨在協助員工更快識別緊急個案，而不只是縮短輪候時間。
questions.answer: The hospital’s new system is not designed merely to reduce waiting times. Rather, it is designed to help staff identify urgent cases more quickly.
questions.answerZh: 醫院的新系統不只是為了縮短輪候時間；而是為了協助員工更快識別緊急個案。
questions.highlight: The hospital’s new system is not designed merely to reduce waiting times. Rather, it is designed to help staff identify urgent cases more quickly.

questions.prompt: The campaign encourages people to reduce unnecessary plastic step by step; it does not ask them to stop using plastic overnight.
questions.promptZh: 這項運動鼓勵人們逐步減少不必要的塑膠使用；它並沒有要求人們立即停止使用塑膠。
questions.answer: The campaign does not ask people to stop using plastic overnight. Rather, it encourages them to reduce unnecessary plastic step by step.
questions.answerZh: 這項運動並沒有要求人們立即停止使用塑膠；而是鼓勵他們逐步減少不必要的塑膠使用。
questions.highlight: The campaign does not ask people to stop using plastic overnight. Rather, it encourages them to reduce unnecessary plastic step by step.

questions.prompt: A strong leader knows when to seek advice from others; leadership does not require making every decision alone.
questions.promptZh: 優秀的領袖知道何時應該向別人尋求意見；領導並不代表必須獨自作出每一個決定。
questions.answer: A strong leader does not need to make every decision alone. Rather, a strong leader knows when to seek advice from others.
questions.answerZh: 優秀的領袖不需要獨自作出每一個決定；相反，優秀的領袖知道何時應該向別人尋求意見。
questions.highlight: A strong leader does not need to make every decision alone. Rather, a strong leader knows when to seek advice from others.

questions.prompt: The report aims to explain honestly what has improved and what still needs attention, not to present the company as perfect.
questions.promptZh: 這份報告旨在誠實說明哪些方面已有改善，以及哪些方面仍需關注，而不是把公司描述成完美無缺。
questions.answer: This report is not intended to present the company as perfect. Rather, it is intended to explain honestly what has improved and what still needs attention.
questions.answerZh: 這份報告並不是為了把公司描述成完美無缺；而是為了誠實說明哪些方面已有改善，以及哪些方面仍需關注。
questions.highlight: This report is not intended to present the company as perfect. Rather, it is intended to explain honestly what has improved and what still needs attention.

questions.prompt: The real issue is which idea can be carried out fairly and safely, not which one sounds better.
questions.promptZh: 真正的問題是哪一個構思能夠公平而安全地實行，而不是哪一個聽起來較好。
questions.answer: Our disagreement is not really about which idea sounds better. Rather, it is about which idea can be carried out fairly and safely.
questions.answerZh: 我們的分歧並不真正關乎哪一個構思聽起來較好；而是關乎哪一個構思能夠公平而安全地實行。
questions.highlight: Our disagreement is not really about which idea sounds better. Rather, it is about which idea can be carried out fairly and safely.

questions.prompt: The new road is one part of a wider plan to improve travel; it will not solve every transport problem in the district.
questions.promptZh: 新道路是改善出行的整體計劃之一；它不會解決區內所有交通問題。
questions.answer: The new road will not solve every transport problem in the district. Rather, it will form one part of a wider plan to improve travel.
questions.answerZh: 新道路不會解決區內所有交通問題；它只是改善出行的整體計劃之一。
questions.highlight: The new road will not solve every transport problem in the district. Rather, it will form one part of a wider plan to improve travel.

questions.prompt: The research suggests that certain patterns of social-media use may affect teenagers’ well-being. It does not prove that social media always harms them.
questions.promptZh: 研究顯示，某些使用社交媒體的模式可能影響青少年的身心健康。它並沒有證明社交媒體一定會傷害他們。
questions.answer: This research does not prove that social media always harms teenagers. Rather, it suggests that certain patterns of use may affect their well-being.
questions.answerZh: 這項研究並沒有證明社交媒體一定會傷害青少年；它只是顯示某些使用模式可能影響他們的身心健康。
questions.highlight: This research does not prove that social media always harms teenagers. Rather, it suggests that certain patterns of use may affect their well-being.

questions.prompt: The policy’s long-term value to the community matters more than its immediate cost.
questions.promptZh: 這項政策為社區帶來的長遠價值，比它目前的成本更重要。
questions.answer: A policy should not be judged only by its immediate cost. Rather, it should be judged by the long-term value it creates for the community.
questions.answerZh: 評價一項政策時，不應只考慮它目前的成本；而應考慮它為社區創造的長遠價值。
questions.highlight: A policy should not be judged only by its immediate cost. Rather, it should be judged by the long-term value it creates for the community.

questions.prompt: Our lives should be shaped by the values and choices that give them meaning, not organised around other people’s expectations.
questions.promptZh: 我們的人生應該由賦予生活意義的價值觀和選擇塑造，而不是圍繞別人的期望來安排。
questions.answer: Life should not be organised around other people’s expectations. Rather, it should be shaped by the values and choices that give our own lives meaning.
questions.answerZh: 人生不應圍繞別人的期望來安排；相反，它應該由賦予我們生活意義的價值觀和選擇塑造。
questions.highlight: Life should not be organised around other people’s expectations. Rather, it should be shaped by the values and choices that give our own lives meaning.
